id.description: Stable kebab-case material id, unique within the project.

shader.description: Shader pipeline. `standard` = MeshStandardMaterial (PBR baseline). `physical` = MeshPhysicalMaterial (adds clearcoat / transmission / sheen / iridescence). `lambert` / `phong` are cheap diffuse / specular paths for stylised projects. `basic` is unlit (UI billboards, particles, debug).

roughness.description: Surface roughness in [0, 1]; 0 = mirror-smooth, 1 = fully diffuse.

emissive.description: Emissive color, six-digit hex. Defaults to #000000 (non-emissive).

alphaMode.description: Blend mode. v0 supports opaque and standard alpha blending.

opacity.description: Material alpha in [0, 1]. Pair with `alphaMode: blend` for transparency. Defaults to 1.

clearcoat.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. 0..1 thin clearcoat layer intensity (car paint, lacquer).

clearcoatRoughness.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. Roughness of the clearcoat layer.

ior.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. Index of refraction (~1.45 for glass, ~1.33 for water).

transmission.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. 0..1 light transmission factor for refractive surfaces.

thickness.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. Approximate thickness for transmissive volumes.

sheen.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. 0..1 sheen layer intensity (fabric, velvet).

iridescence.description: MeshPhysicalMaterial only. 0..1 iridescence intensity (soap bubble, oil slick).

shininess.description: MeshPhongMaterial only. Specular highlight tightness; higher = sharper.

map.description: Base color texture path (`runtime/textures/...`). Multiplies with `color`. Loaded via the shared TextureLoader; KTX2-encoded files route through the singleton KTX2Loader.

normalMap.description: Tangent-space normal map. Tangents are auto-generated by Three when missing.

normalScale.description: Scale applied to the normal map's XY components. Default 1.

roughnessMap.description: Greyscale roughness texture. Sampled on the green channel per glTF convention.

metalnessMap.description: Greyscale metalness texture. Sampled on the blue channel per glTF convention.

emissiveMap.description: Emissive color texture. Multiplied with `emissive` colour and `emissiveIntensity`.

emissiveIntensity.description: Scalar on the emissive contribution. Defaults to 1.

aoMap.description: Ambient occlusion texture. Sampled on the red channel per glTF convention.
